channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: America's entrepreneurial surge starts well before venture capital funding
item.description: Latino-owned businesses added 180,000 net new firms from 2017 to 2023, while white-owned firms declined, highlighting a growing talent pipeline.

item.title: CEO uses AI to double revenue while hiring 1,000 fewer people: 'Nobody's going to replace the last mile'
item.description: "I was having a conversation this weekend with Claude and it was a pretty in-depth conversation," W.J. Werzyn told Fortune. Then it hallucinated.

item.title: How David Senra built a podcast that top CEOs like Bezos and Dell can't stop listening to
item.description: Founders has fans including Jeff Bezos and Michael Dell, and its 'unmanageable' creator turned down $50 million to build a media empire on his own terms.

item.title: Former workaholic CEO now leaves at 5:30 p.m. and avoids weekend texts
item.description: The U.S. Polo Assn. chief joins other executives setting strict boundaries, like Netflix's cofounder and JPMorgan's Jamie Dimon.
